title: Reclamation Bounty - The Bracer of Amahurzha
summary: Westward of Marriton is a cemetary, beneath a mausoleum therein is believed to be a winding crypt of the hero Amahurzha. Amahurzha is a hero from Pelorian folklore. Historians from Undervell University and the Temple of Pelor have given a shared bounty on the reclamation of his famed bracer.
contact: High Priest Highsmith, The Historical Society of Undervell
